title: RF Site Planning API — Deployment Configuration
description: Single source of truth for every operator-tunable knob referenced anywhere in spec v2. Keys here have no effect outside the deployment and are NEVER returned in API responses (Appendix E.4 explicitly forbids returning `restricted_species_polygons`). Defaults match the spec; an empty config object accepts every default. The schema is exhaustive: any knob mentioned in the spec as 'deployment-configurable', 'operator-set', 'per-deployment', or referenced as a default (`default ...`) appears here. Adding a new knob requires the same cross-artifact-sync discipline as adding a spec primitive.

auto_async_cell_threshold.description: Estimated output cell count above which `mode: auto` selects async.

auto_async_area_km2.description: Declared geometry area above which `mode: auto` selects async.

sync_budget_seconds.description: Sync HTTP response budget; on overrun the request is auto-promoted to async with HTTP 202.

idempotency_window_days.description: How long Idempotency-Key + key_id reuse returns the prior Run (spec §2.3).

webhook_verification_ttl_days.description: How long a verified webhook URL skips the registration-challenge handshake (spec §2.4).

webhook_secret_rotation_grace_hours.description: Hours after secret rotation during which the old secret is also accepted (spec §2.4).

webhook_retry_window_minutes.description: Total bounded window for webhook retries (spec §2.4).

opsec_authorized_webhook_urls.description: Allowlist of webhook URLs cleared to receive `restricted_species` deliveries (Appendix E.2). Webhook delivery for restricted_species runs is suppressed unless the target is on this list.

asset_orphan_ttl_days.description: Days an asset with zero references is retained before purge (spec §3.5).

multipart_session_ttl_hours.description: Hours after `:initiate` before an incomplete multipart upload is aborted (spec §3.5).

runs.description: Per-Run lifecycle, retention, and resource limits (spec §8.1, §8.2).

global_ceiling.description: Hard ceiling regardless of per-op configuration (spec §8.1).

cancellation_check_seconds.description: Worst-case cancellation latency target. The 60 s hard ceiling in §8.1 caps this.

max_pinned_runs_per_key.description: Pin cap per key; Comparison creation that exceeds this is rejected with 409 PINNED_RUN_CAP_WOULD_BE_EXCEEDED (spec §8.2).

storage_quota_bytes_per_key.description: Per-key storage quota, in bytes. 0 disables the quota (spec §8.2).

tile_size_px.description: Tile granularity for Op B/D checkpointing (spec §8.1).

retention_ttls.description: Per-class canonical artifact TTLs in days (spec §8.2).

opsec.description: Operational sensitivity / redaction policy (spec Appendix E).

default_sensitivity_class.description: Class assigned when a submission omits `sensitivity_class` (Appendix E.3).

require_explicit_classification_in_polyg.description: Strict mode: submissions whose geometry intersects a restricted_species polygon must declare the class explicitly (Appendix E.3).

redaction_grid_cell_size_m.description: Coordinate-snap grid for `location_redacted` redaction (Appendix E.2). AOI bboxes are snapped to 5× this size.

restricted_species_polygons.description: Deployment-only policy data; never returned via the API. Polygons that auto-promote intersecting submissions to `restricted_species` (Appendix E.4).

driver.description: v1 stores bearer-key hashes in the same Postgres instance as the Run record (ADR-0002).

argon2id.description: Argon2id parameters for hashing API keys (ADR-0002).

prefix_index_chars.description: Number of leading characters of the bearer key used as the lookup index (ADR-0002).

rate_limit_classes.description: Map of `rate_limit_class` name → bucket parameters. Keys land here from the auth adapter's `Principal.rate_limit_class` (spec §8.4).

plugin_order.description: Equivalent to the RFANALYZER_PLUGIN_ORDER environment variable: comma-separated entry-point names that load before the alphabetical default. Used to break tie-breaks for auto-select (spec §4.2, §4.4, §4.6).

auto_select_tiebreak_preference.description: Auto-select tiebreak preference order on equal `scenario_suitability` score (spec §4.4 step 5).

propagation_models.description: Third-party-plugin allowlist for the propagation-model registry (ADR-0003). Enforces spec §4.2's 'v1 onboards only first-party-reviewed plugins' stance at runtime. Core-bundled models (free-space, two-ray) are not subject to this gate.

allow_third_party.description: When false (default), only entry points whose name appears in `allowlist` are registered; others are logged and skipped at startup. When true, every entry point loads regardless of allowlist membership. Default-closed prevents an arbitrary `pip install`ed plugin from running in the engine process before sandboxing lands.

allowlist.description: Entry-point names trusted by this deployment. Entry points outside this list are logged and skipped (not a startup failure — a typo must not brick the deployment). The default lists the v1 base-pack plugins; free-space and two-ray are core-bundled and not represented here.

polar_threshold_lat_deg.description: Absolute latitude beyond which polar projection (EPSG:3413/3031) is used and POLAR_PROJECTION_DEGRADED is emitted (spec §5.5).

fetched_layer_upstreams.description: Map of layer kind → upstream provider config (spec §5.3). Required only if the deployment supports `source: fetched` AOI Pack creation.

provider.description: Selected by the STORAGE_PROVIDER env var; this field documents the resolved value.

filesystem_root.description: Absolute host path; required when provider=filesystem.

redaction_keys.description: Per ADR-0002. Exact-key match, case-insensitive, recursive 5 levels. Operators may extend the default set but should not shrink it.
